## Summary


## Test plan

- [ ] `pnpm verify`

## Compatibility

- [ ] Public API response shape is unchanged, or compatibility impact is documented.
- [ ] CLI behavior is unchanged, or release notes explain the change.
- [ ] Public docs are updated when public behavior changes.

## Safety

- [ ] No secrets, private keys, local identities or tokens are committed.
- [ ] External package metadata and prompt text are treated as untrusted input.
- [ ] No third party endorsement is claimed unless it is explicitly approved.
- [ ] Hosted API changes do not read or write caller workspaces.
